instruction: Name the first three astronauts to walk on the surface of the Moon, in the order in which they stepped onto its surface.

ground_truth.value: Neil Armstrong, Buzz Aldrin, Pete Conrad

provenance.adaptation: Question style adapted from the source benchmark; specific instance curated for stable historically grounded ground truth so the answer does not drift with the live web. The structural research-and-synthesis profile (difficulty: high) is preserved.
